1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px dense interactive resource planning layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Split Matrix Sheet (Left Navigation Sidebar Panel: Unassigned Project Backlog Queue & Available Engineering/Consultant Lists; Main Right Content Workspace: Multi-Tiered Chronological Gantt Matrix Sheet tracking horizontal timeline grid slots; Contextual Panel Overlay: Sliding Bottom Sheet detailing localized capacity allocations, hourly rates, and variance metrics)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains chronological timeline grid canvas side-by-side with active resource list panels)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The left unassigned queue collapses into a slide-out drawer tab to preserve horizontal text alignment inside scheduling lanes)

key_visible_sections.title: Human Capital Timeline Scheduling Grid Matrix

user_progression_routes.on_load: Acquire active portfolio coordinator access keys -> Read global tenant multi-tenant boundary profiles -> Execute state request payload fetch from ProjectService.getResourceCapacity()
user_progression_routes.on_allocation_drop: Recalculate regional utilization totals, calculate timeline allocations overlaps, and push asynchronous state modifications to backend services

redirection_rules.condition: If a human capital element's compiled weekly schedule allocation values exceed total limit boundaries (> 100.0% / 40 Hours Over-allocation)
redirection_rules.action: Flash an immediate vivid crimson highlighting glow overlay context boundary onto the affected scheduling slot grid cell and launch layout alert text 'Critical Over-Allocation Detected'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User double-clicks an active chronological block row item within a matrix lane
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Slide up contextual bottom management panel enabling micro-modifications over billable target rates parameters, direct billing classifications, and manual schedule limits shifts

atoms.type: Semantic Micro Skill Indicator Pill Label
Tabular Numeric Core Whole Integer Form Box

molecules.composition: Combines human capital element avatar image + name string text label + localized core capability skill badge arrays + calculated cumulative weekly utilization percentage row token component
Combines parent project sequence lookup key + required execution role description title + projected duration hours count + interactive vector grab element handles

organisms.composition: Vertical tracking column list grouping unassigned resource requirements cards, managing keyword filtering scripts and binding drag events hooks.

Robust two-dimensional dynamic scheduling table grid linking resource_profile_lane_header elements rows directly to consecutive horizontal cell slot matrices, complete with date intervals sorting bars loops and grid selection listeners frameworks.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, sans-serif (Tabular monospaced numerals fonts enforced strictly across calculation grids to maintain tight column text alignment boundaries records)

scales.utilization_large_percentage: font-size: 1.5rem (24px) | font-weight: 800 | font-family: monospace tabular-numerals scaling

color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.allocation_optimal_indigo: #6366F1 (Indigo Blue Target Healthy Capacity Planning Operations Accent)
color_palette_hex.allocation_breach_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Resource Scheduling Overload Overdraft Line Indicator)
color_palette_hex.timeline_grid_lines: #334155 (Slate Charcoal Grid Boundary Partition Markers Separator Line)

spacing_and_borders.matrix_cell_height_density: 3.0rem (48px spatial lane padding heights optimizing clear vertical rows visualization)

background-color properties transform settings pointer map to value #334155 using an instantaneous 60ms time window framework

local_reactive_state_variables.active_resource_lane_pointer_id: Tracks currently focused resource database identifier row used to populate bottom management panel layouts fields (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_allocation_editor_visible: Boolean state toggling visible formatting layer margins for the bottom sheet micro-allocation configuration inputs worksheets form canvas
local_reactive_state_variables.resource_matrix_skills_filter_array: Array collection layer routing active text capabilities matching checks across resource tags list rows fields parameters instantly

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared enterprise system global multi-tenant business scope token variable controlling schema isolation domain values cross runtime executions
global_application_context_bindings.hr_employee_availability_shared_cache: Global datastore cache saving active multi-tenant corporate profiles logs and tracking calendar absence/leave states to secure planning data consistency

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 document constructs built completely over layout Tailwind CSS utility classes class rules sets, running zero third-party graph compilers scripts natively inside modular asynchronous client-side ES6 engine classes utilizing the HTML5 Drag and Drop API architecture wrappers smoothly
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Recalculating calendar capacity vectors array models across a 50-resource row Gantt canvas following drag events execution drops must compute timeline shifts fields maps updates under a target threshold limit of 12ms

Append successfully generated allocation data parameters vectors back inside resource_id lane blocks index inside resource_scheduling_lanes_matrix data cache array collection, then evict requirements cards matching indices out of unallocated_staffing_requirements_backlog local states stacks arrays
